app.title: AI Meeting Protocolist
app.tagline: Automatic meeting minutes. Kazakh • Russian • English.

hero.title: Turn meetings into structured protocols — automatically.
hero.subtitle: Record live or upload audio. We transcribe Kazakh, Russian, and English (with code-switching), then generate clean minutes you can export to PDF, DOCX, JSON, SRT, or VTT.
hero.demoHint: Try it instantly with the demo account on the sign-in page.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps from raw audio to a polished protocol.

record.title: Record or upload
record.body: Stream from your microphone in real time, or drop in an existing recording up to 500 MB.

transcribe.title: Transcribe & diarize
transcribe.body: Whisper-grade ASR with speaker labels, timestamps, and per-segment language detection.

export.title: Generate & export
export.body: Pick a template, let the LLM fill it with decisions and action items, then export anywhere.

features.title: Everything you need for clean minutes
features.subtitle: Built for boards, councils, and product teams that take meetings seriously.

live.title: Live transcription
live.body: Stream from the browser with partial-word updates and a live waveform.

upload.title: Upload audio
upload.body: WAV, MP3, M4A, OGG, FLAC, WEBM — processed in the background.

protocol.title: Templated protocols
protocol.body: Mustache-based templates for agendas, decisions, votes, and action items.

multilingual.title: KK · RU · EN
multilingual.body: Multilingual ASR with code-switching support tuned for Kazakh meetings.

ai.title: GPT-4o summaries
ai.body: Structured summaries with citations back to the transcript.

private.title: Self-hosted
private.body: Bring your own keys. Audio stays in your MinIO bucket — not on someone else's server.

finalCta.title: Ready to skip note-taking forever?
finalCta.body: Create a free account, drop in your first recording, and watch a protocol appear in minutes.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to get started

dashboard.title: My meetings
dashboard.subtitle: Uploaded recordings and live sessions
dashboard.empty: Nothing yet. Upload audio or start a live meeting.

search.label: Search
search.noResultsBody: Try a different keyword or clear the filters.

upload.title: Upload recording
upload.subtitle: Drop a file or click to pick
upload.formats: WAV, MP3, M4A, OGG, FLAC, WEBM — up to 500 MB
upload.languagesHint: One language → forced. Multiple → per-chunk auto-detect (supports KK↔RU code-switching).

live.title: Live meeting
live.subtitle: Create a session and start recording from the microphone
live.providerOpenaiTranscribeHint: OpenAI's high-quality ASR model. Each utterance is POSTed to /v1/audio/transcriptions after silence. Needs OPENAI_API_KEY.
live.providerHfSpaceHint: Your HuggingFace Space. First request ~30 s (cold start), then fast. Needs HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN if private.
live.providerHfKazakh: HuggingFace Kazakh (runs on HF servers, free, no local GPU)
live.providerLocalKazakh: Local Kazakh (whisper-turbo-ksc2 — on your GPU, free)
live.providerOpenaiHint: OpenAI cloud model. Needs OPENAI_API_KEY and internet.
live.providerHfKazakhHint: Model runs on HuggingFace servers. First request ~30 s (cold start), then fast. Needs HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN.
live.providerLocalKazakhHint: Kazakh-tuned Whisper on your GPU. First run converts to CT2 (~5 min), then instant. Free.
live.providerLocalHint: Vanilla Whisper. Good ru/en, mediocre Kazakh.

connection.retryingIn: Retry attempt {attempt} in {seconds}s. Audio is buffered locally.

share.title: Share live view
share.hint: Anyone with the QR code or link can read the live transcript — no login required.

protocol.hint: Pick a template and format. The LLM fills the template with facts from the transcript.

recording.title: Recording
recording.unsupported: Your browser cannot play this format — download the file instead.

report.title: Generate report
report.description: Pick a template and format. The model fills it with facts from the transcript.
report.empty: Transcript is empty — cannot generate a report.

templates.uploadHint: A markdown file with Mustache placeholders (e.g. {{chair}}, {{#items}}…{{/items}}). YAML frontmatter is optional.
templates.bodyRequired: Attach a file or paste text

insights.title: Meeting insights
insights.subtitle: Speaker share, top topics, and key moments — generated after the recording.
insights.emptyHint: Insights appear once the meeting has some transcribed content.

publicViewer.transcriptHint: Read-only view. New segments appear as they are spoken.
publicViewer.missingToken: This link is missing a viewer token.
publicViewer.notFound: This session is not available — the token may be invalid or revoked.
